title: SQL: can't use variable name staring with _digit in SQL func
poc: CREATE FUNCTION foo(_1 int) RETURNS int BEGIN RETURN _1; END;
key_bug_features: Variable names cannot start with a digit in SQL functions
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id int PRIMARY KEY, name varchar(50), value float);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, value) VALUES (1, 'test', 3.14);
CREATE FUNCTION foo(_1 int) RETURNS int BEGIN RETURN _1;
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE value > (SELECT AVG(value) FROM test_table);
